message:
ci: Add test statistics to CI job summaries

Each test job now shows in the GitHub step summary:
- Total tests run
- Passed count
- Failed count
- Pass rate percentage

Uses platform-appropriate parsing (bash for Linux/macOS, PowerShell for Windows).

files.patch:
@@ -37,7 +37,30 @@ jobs:
         run: zig build
 
       - name: Run platform-independent CPython tests
-        run: ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython @core
+        id: test-core
+        run: |
+          ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython @core 2>&1 | tee test_output.txt || true
+          # Parse results and write summary
+          if grep -q "passed" test_output.txt; then
+            PASSED=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+ passed' test_output.txt | grep -oE '[0-9]+' || echo "0")
+            FAILED=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+ failed' test_output.txt | grep -oE '[0-9]+' || echo "0")
+            TOTAL=$((PASSED + FAILED))
+            if [ "$TOTAL" -gt 0 ]; then
+              RATE=$(echo "scale=1; $PASSED * 100 / $TOTAL" | bc)
+            else
+              RATE="0"
+            fi
+            echo "## 📊 Test Results - @core" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| Metric | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "|--------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| ✅ Passed | $PASSED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| ❌ Failed | $FAILED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| 📋 Total | $TOTAL |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| 📈 Pass Rate | ${RATE}% |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          fi
+          # Exit with failure if tests failed
+          grep -q "failed" test_output.txt && grep -oE '[0-9]+ failed' test_output.txt | grep -qv "^0 " && exit 1 || true
         timeout-minutes: 60
 
   test-cpython-linux:
@@ -59,7 +82,28 @@ jobs:
         run: zig build
 
       - name: Run Linux-specific CPython tests
-        run: ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython @linux
+        id: test-linux

+          ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython @linux 2>&1 | tee test_output.txt || true
+          if grep -q "passed" test_output.txt; then
+            PASSED=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+ passed' test_output.txt | grep -oE '[0-9]+' || echo "0")
+            FAILED=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+ failed' test_output.txt | grep -oE '[0-9]+' || echo "0")
+            TOTAL=$((PASSED + FAILED))
+            if [ "$TOTAL" -gt 0 ]; then
+              RATE=$(echo "scale=1; $PASSED * 100 / $TOTAL" | bc)
+            else
+              RATE="0"
+            fi
+            echo "## 📊 Test Results - @linux" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| Metric | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "|--------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| ✅ Passed | $PASSED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| ❌ Failed | $FAILED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| 📋 Total | $TOTAL |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| 📈 Pass Rate | ${RATE}% |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          fi
+          grep -q "failed" test_output.txt && grep -oE '[0-9]+ failed' test_output.txt | grep -qv "^0 " && exit 1 || true
         timeout-minutes: 60
 
   test-cpython-macos:
@@ -81,7 +125,28 @@ jobs:
         run: zig build
 
       - name: Run macOS-specific CPython tests
-        run: ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython @macos
+        id: test-macos
+        run: |
+          ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython @macos 2>&1 | tee test_output.txt || true
+          if grep -q "passed" test_output.txt; then
+            PASSED=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+ passed' test_output.txt | grep -oE '[0-9]+' || echo "0")
+            FAILED=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+ failed' test_output.txt | grep -oE '[0-9]+' || echo "0")
+            TOTAL=$((PASSED + FAILED))
+            if [ "$TOTAL" -gt 0 ]; then
+              RATE=$(echo "scale=1; $PASSED * 100 / $TOTAL" | bc)
+            else
+              RATE="0"
+            fi
+            echo "## 📊 Test Results - @macos" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| Metric | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "|--------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| ✅ Passed | $PASSED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| ❌ Failed | $FAILED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| 📋 Total | $TOTAL |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "| 📈 Pass Rate | ${RATE}% |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          fi
+          grep -q "failed" test_output.txt && grep -oE '[0-9]+ failed' test_output.txt | grep -qv "^0 " && exit 1 || true
         timeout-minutes: 60
 
   test-cpython-windows:
@@ -103,5 +168,32 @@ jobs:
         run: zig build
 
       - name: Run Windows-specific CPython tests
-        run: .\zig-out\bin\metal0.exe test tests/cpython @windows
+        id: test-windows
+        shell: pwsh
+        run: |
+          $output = & .\zig-out\bin\metal0.exe test tests/cpython @windows 2>&1 | Tee-Object -Variable testOutput
+          $testOutput | Out-File -FilePath test_output.txt
+          Write-Output $testOutput
+
+          # Parse results
+          $passedMatch = [regex]::Match($testOutput, '(\d+) passed')
+          $failedMatch = [regex]::Match($testOutput, '(\d+) failed')
+
+          $passed = if ($passedMatch.Success) { [int]$passedMatch.Groups[1].Value } else { 0 }
+          $failed = if ($failedMatch.Success) { [int]$failedMatch.Groups[1].Value } else { 0 }
+          $total = $passed + $failed
+          $rate = if ($total -gt 0) { [math]::Round(($passed / $total) * 100, 1) } else { 0 }
+
+          # Write summary
+          "## 📊 Test Results - @windows" | Out-File -Append -FilePath $env:GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          "" | Out-File -Append -FilePath $env:GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          "| Metric | Value |" | Out-File -Append -FilePath $env:GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          "|--------|-------|" | Out-File -Append -FilePath $env:GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          "| ✅ Passed | $passed |" | Out-File -Append -FilePath $env:GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          "| ❌ Failed | $failed |" | Out-File -Append -FilePath $env:GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          "| 📋 Total | $total |" | Out-File -Append -FilePath $env:GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          "| 📈 Pass Rate | ${rate}% |" | Out-File -Append -FilePath $env:GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+
+          # Exit with failure if tests failed
+          if ($failed -gt 0) { exit 1 }
         timeout-minutes: 60
